forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KRRN3SP5D1H63TQ8HM7SQZ1F
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8580'
+project: ai-panel
+title: WebSocket ACP message stream (TypeScript)
+---
+## What
+Build the bidirectional message stream the TypeScript ACP SDK consumes, backed by the **browser-native `WebSocket`**. This is the webview's connection to the ACP agent â€” pure WebSocket, no Tauri in the data path.
+
+- Add `@agentclientprotocol/sdk` to `apps/kanban-app/ui/package.json`.
+- New `apps/kanban-app/ui/src/ai/acp-stream.ts`. Open a browser `WebSocket` to the `ws://127.0.0.1:<port>` URL returned by `ai_start_agent` (task "ACP agent process manager"). Wrap it as a `ReadableStream<Uint8Array>` / `WritableStream<Uint8Array>` byte pair.
+- Feed that through the SDK's `ndJsonStream` to produce the bidirectional `Stream` of ACP JSON-RPC messages that `ClientSideConnection` expects.
+- Handle lifecycle: the stream ends when the socket closes (cleanly or on error); surface errors.
+
+The single `invoke` of `ai_start_agent` to obtain the URL is one-time configuration discovery â€” the ACP messages themselves never pass through Tauri.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `@agentclientprotocol/sdk` is a dependency; the module produces a `Stream` suitable for `ClientSideConnection`.
+- [ ] ACP messages round-trip over the WebSocket as ndjson; the stream closes when the socket closes.
+- [ ] `npm run build` in `apps/kanban-app/ui` succeeds.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Vitest unit test against a mock/in-memory WebSocket server: push ndjson frames in â†’ assert parsed ACP messages out; write ACP messages â†’ assert ndjson frames on the wire; closing the socket closes the stream.
+- [ ] `npm test` (`tsc --noEmit && vitest run`) in `apps/kanban-app/ui` is green.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write the ndjson round-trip test against a mock WebSocket first.
\ No newline at end of file
